title: Tennessee Public Records Act Request – Grounds Maintenance Bid Tabulations (RFP #01032023LB & RFP #112224LB)

communications.subject: Tennessee Public Records Act Request: Tennessee Public Records Act Request – Grounds Maintenance Bid Tabulations (RFP #01032023LB & RFP #112224LB)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act, Tenn. Code Ann. § 10-7-503 et seq., I am requesting access to and copies of the following records:

1. RFP #01032023LB – "Grounds Maintenance Services – 5.1 Acres and Greater"
   Issued: December 8, 2022 | Proposals Due: January 3, 2023

   a. The complete bid tabulation, including the name of each respondent and their total proposed pricing by lot/grouping.
   b. All submitted Compensation/Pricing Schedules (Appendix I) from each respondent, including per-acre unit pricing and total proposed cost per site location or property grouping.
   c. Any summary document prepared by the Procurement Office following proposal opening.

2. RFP #112224LB – "Districtwide Grounds Maintenance Services"
   Issued: November 2024 | Proposals Due: November 22, 2024

   a. The complete bid tabulation, including the name of each respondent and their total proposed pricing.
   b. All submitted pricing or compensation schedules from each respondent, including any per-acre or per-unit pricing and total proposed cost.
   c. Any summary document prepared by the Procurement Office following proposal opening.

Please provide all records in electronic format (PDF or Excel) where available. If any portion of the requested records is withheld, please identify the specific statutory exemption relied upon and provide all remaining non-exempt portions.

Thank you for your assistance.

Respectfully,

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kent Hoover, a citizen of Tennessee, in coordination with Drek Hawkins.
